series_metadata.series_description: Documents maintained outside the scope of personnel files. Can included, but may not be limited to, personnel actions, internal investigation documents, and settlement agreements for exempt and bargaining unit employees.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: employees who disability retired prior 1/7/2013, from separation. all other employees, 3 years from separation. ; Electronic: from separation employees who disability retired prior 1/7/2013, unless converted paper. all other employees, 3 years from separation, unless converted paper
